mapper.sql: MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, MESSAGE_TYPE, STATUS, TITLE, SUMMARY, BIZ_ID, LINK_PATH, LINK_QUERY, EXTRA, IS_READ, READ_AT, EXPIRE_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_MESSAGES ( MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, MESSAGE_TYPE, STATUS, TITLE, SUMMARY, BIZ_ID, LINK_PATH, LINK_QUERY, EXTRA, IS_READ, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{userId}, #{messageType}, #{status}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{bizId}, #{linkPath}, #{linkQuery}, #{extra}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_MESSAGES SET STATUS = #{status}, TITLE = #{title}, SUMMARY = #{summary}, LINK_PATH = #{linkPath}, LINK_QUERY = #{linkQuery}, EXTRA = #{extra}, IS_READ = 0, READ_AT = NULL, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND MESSAGE_TYPE = #{messageType} AND BIZ_ID = #{bizId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USER_MESSAGES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_READ = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_MESSAGES SET IS_READ = 1, READ_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_READ = 0
UPDATE USER_MESSAGES SET IS_READ = 1, READ_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_READ = 0
